doNotOverstate: Do not import BWV unless the papers support it.
Do not import custody safeguards unless the papers support it.
Do not import drugs continuity unless the papers support it.
Do not import ABE unless the papers support it.
Do not import phone extraction/metadata unless the papers support it.
Do not state "interview confirms" — Interview material is not fully served
Do not state "CAD/999 timing supports" — CAD/999 material is not safely on file as served
hardRules: Referred only does not mean usable.
Inference must be labelled as inference.
No line is sendable just because a source exists.

chaseItems.label: Interview recording / transcript
chaseItems.copySuggestion:
Please provide interview recording / transcript or confirm in writing why it is not available.

[CaseBrain — CPS chase copy. Evidence state: provisional. Source: Custody / police interview unit. Solicitor review required before sending.]

chaseItems.label: MG6 / unused schedule clarification
chaseItems.copySuggestion:
Please provide mG6 / unused schedule clarification or confirm in writing why it is not available.

[CaseBrain — CPS chase copy. Evidence state: provisional. Source: CPS / disclosure officer. Solicitor review required before sending.]

courtNote.text:
The defence asks the court to record that source material must be clarified and timetabled.

[CaseBrain — court line copy. Evidence state: needs review. Confirm before addressing the court.]

exportVersion.reviewFooter: Solicitor review required before sending to CPS, court, or client.
